subtitle: A wind-scoured, north-facing beach near Cape Farewell where four sea-stack arches stand offshore, fur seal pups gather in the rock pools, and the water is too rip-torn to swim — the Archway Islands here became the Windows 10 lock screen.
spike_statement: The Archway Islands off Wharariki Beach are the default Windows 10 lock screen image, photographed from a cave on a beach too rip-torn to swim.

levers.photo_tone: wide windswept low tide, the four Archway Islands offshore, wet reflective sand, spray off the Tasman Sea, exposed grass-topped dunes behind
